symbols.name: SubstituteFunc
symbols.summary: Function type for doing final config tweaking on prepared FcPatterns.

symbols.name: FontMap
symbols.summary: The `PangoFT2FontMap` is the `PangoFontMap` implementation for FreeType fonts.

symbols.summary: Gets the `PangoCoverage` for a `PangoFT2Font`.  Use [method@Pango.Font.get_coverage] instead.

symbols.name: font_get_kerning
symbols.summary: Retrieves kerning information for a combination of two glyphs.  Use pango_fc_font_kern_glyphs() instead.

symbols.summary: Free the global fontmap. (See pango_ft2_font_map_for_display()) Use of the global PangoFT2 fontmap is deprecated.
